Header file for user interface components in the Pebble firmware, including layers and animations.

# Purpose
This code is a C source file that includes a series of header files related to graphical user interface (GUI) components and functionalities. It appears to be part of a larger application, likely for a platform that uses a layered windowing system. The included headers suggest that the file provides access to various UI elements such as windows, layers, animations, and input handling. Specific components include `window`, `menu_layer`, `text_layer`, and `animation`, among others, which are used to build and manage the visual and interactive aspects of the application. The inclusion of headers like `vibes` and `number_window` indicates support for haptic feedback and numeric input, respectively.
